home.site_desc: Welcome to Book Store, your destination for discovering timeless classics and modern masterpieces. We offer a curated collection of books across all genres — from fiction and fantasy to philosophy and science fiction. Whether you are a casual reader or a devoted bookworm, you will find something to love in our collection.
home.fiction_desc: Dive into captivating stories and unforgettable characters.
home.fantasy_desc: Explore magical worlds and epic adventures beyond imagination.
home.philosophy_desc: Discover wisdom and ideas that have shaped human thought.
home.vision_desc: At Book Store, our vision is to inspire a love of reading in every person. We believe that books have the power to transform lives, broaden perspectives, and connect people across cultures and generations.
home.mission_desc: Our mission is to provide readers with easy access to a diverse selection of quality books at affordable prices, while creating a welcoming community for book lovers everywhere.
home.member_desc: Explore our latest collection and leave your reviews.
home.join_desc: Sign up to leave reviews and get personalized recommendations.

about.heading: About Us
about.about_p: Welcome to Book Store — where stories come alive! We are passionate about connecting readers with the books they love. Whether you are searching for a timeless classic, a thrilling page-turner, or a thought-provoking masterpiece, we have got you covered.

books.no_books: No books found matching your search or filter.

reviews.no_reviews: No reviews yet — be the first to leave one!

the_great_gatsby.name: The Great Gatsby
the_great_gatsby.desc: A story of the fabulously wealthy Jay Gatsby and his love for Daisy Buchanan.

to_kill_a_mockingbird.name: To Kill a Mockingbird
to_kill_a_mockingbird.desc: A novel about racial injustice in the Deep South through the eyes of a child.

1984.desc: A dystopian novel set in a totalitarian society under constant surveillance.

pride_and_prejudice.name: Pride and Prejudice
pride_and_prejudice.desc: A romantic novel about the Bennet family and the proud Mr. Darcy.

the_catcher_in_the_rye.name: The Catcher in the Rye
the_catcher_in_the_rye.desc: A story about teenage rebellion and alienation in 1950s America.

harry_potter.name: Harry Potter
harry_potter.desc: A young wizard discovers his magical heritage and attends Hogwarts.

the_lord_of_the_rings.name: The Lord of the Rings
the_lord_of_the_rings.desc: An epic fantasy adventure to destroy the One Ring and save Middle-earth.

the_alchemist.name: The Alchemist
the_alchemist.desc: A shepherd boy travels from Spain to Egypt in search of treasure.
